description_long: This is a classic brass and leather telescope mounted on a sturdy wooden tripod. The telescope features a cylindrical body with metallic gold-colored end caps and a textured black central section, suggesting a leather or faux-leather grip. The tripod is constructed from dark wood with brass fittings, providing both stability and an elegant, vintage appearance. The legs are slim, angular, and reinforced with metal brackets at the joints, and the central hub is detailed with metallic hardware for adjusting the height and angle. The telescope is affixed to the tripod with a simple screw mount, and the overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century scientific instruments. This object would be at home in an urban park, observatory, or as a decorative piece in an office or study.
description: A vintage-style brass and leather telescope mounted on a dark wooden tripod with metallic fittings, evoking a classic scientific instrument.
description_view_0: The telescope is viewed head-on, showing the circular opening and the alignment of the tripod legs beneath it.
description_view_1: A clear side profile reveals the full length of the telescope and the symmetrical arrangement of the tripod legs.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the eyepiece of the telescope and the converging tripod legs.
description_view_3: Another side profile, mirroring view 1, with the telescope and tripod fully visible from the opposite direction.
